user.title: Set up Brugopeningen
user.description:
Monitor Dutch bridge openings in real time via the NDW (Nationaal Dataregister Wegverkeer) open data API.

No credentials are required. After setup, click the ⚙️ icon on the integration card to select which bridges you want to follow.

bridges.title: Select bridges to follow
bridges.description:
Choose the bridges you want to monitor. Leave empty to follow all bridges.

Bridge names can be changed via Settings → Devices & Services → Brugopeningen → the device.
